name: Random.Pcg.Extended

values.name: andMap
values.type: Generator a -> Generator (a -> b) -> Generator b

values.name: andThen
values.type: (a -> Generator b) -> Generator a -> Generator b

values.name: config
values.comment: The config for the PCG-extended variant

values.name: frequency
values.type: List ( Float, Generator a ) -> Generator a

values.name: initialSeed
values.comment:
Seed this generator with some random data.
Best get this via a flag from `window.crypto.getRandomValues(..)`

values.name: map2
values.type: (a -> b -> c) -> Generator a -> Generator b -> Generator c

values.name: map3

values.name: map4
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d -> e) -> Generator a -> Generator b -> Generator c -> Generator d -> Generator e

values.name: map5
values.type: (a -> b -> c -> d -> e -> f) -> Generator a -> Generator b -> Generator c -> Generator d -> Generator e -> Generator f

values.name: maybe
values.type: Generator Bool -> Generator a -> Generator (Maybe a)

values.name: pair
values.type: Generator a -> Generator b -> Generator ( a, b )
